classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumerRecipient, transactionAmount, transactionDate, invoiceReceiptNumber, taxInformation, paymentMethod, and itemDescriptionLineItems. The presence of these fields, along with the detailed breakdown of the fare and taxes, confirms that this is an expense document related to a flight.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: All required fields for expense identification were found in the document, confirming it as an expense.

extraction.fare_calculation: ROM AY X/HEL AY OUL214.90AY X/HEL AY ROM193.53NUC408.43END ROE0.948998
extraction.special_notes: Baggage allowance and charges are provided for information only. Additional discounts may apply depending on advance purchase or Flyer-specific factors. Most carriers' e-tickets have expiration dates and conditions of use.
extraction.terms_conditions: If the passenger's journey involves an ultimate destination or stop in a country other than the country of departure, the Montreal or the Warsaw Convention may be applicable. The Convention governs and in most cases limits the liability of carriers for death or personal injury and in respect of loss or damage to baggage.
extraction.contact_information: Information about prohibited or restricted materials as baggage, baggage allowance and conditions of carriage and notices is available at any Finnair service point or at www.finnair.com. Finnair customer feedback: www.finnair.com/feedback
extraction.data_protection_notice: Your personal data will be processed in accordance with the applicable carrier's privacy policy and, if your booking is made via a reservation system provider GDS, with its privacy policy. These are available at http://www.iatatravelcenter.com/privacy or from the carrier or GDS directly.
extraction.flight_sequence_notice: Flight must always be used in sequence as shown on the ticket. If you leave any part of your flights unused, the remaining flights will be automatically cancelled.
extraction.online_checkin_info: You can check in online 36 hours before departure when your journey begins with a Finnair flight at www.finnair.com/checkin.
extraction.self_service_kiosk_info: If you use the self-service kiosk at the airport, please use the barcode from your boarding pass or e-ticket.

issues.description: The supplier name is present but should be listed as the ICP company details on the invoice for non-travel expenses.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Invoice must show Global People s.r.l., Via Venti Settembre 3, Torino (TO) CAP 10121, Italy VAT: IT12455930011 C.F: 12455930011 - The Local Employers name and details should appear on invoices, not the workers

issues.description: The fare amount will be grossed up as per the compliance policy for flights.
issues.recommendation: All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax-free
issues.knowledge_base_reference: All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax-free

issues.description: Additional documentation is required for the flight expense.
issues.recommendation: Business Trip - submit a separate report for each trip

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has issues with supplier name formatting, requires gross-up for the fare, and needs additional documentation for the business trip.
